Local authorities are responding to a Wildfire. An EVACUATION WARNING has been issued PREPARE TO LEAVE.  Consider leaving now if you need more time to evacuate. Call 911 for emergency assistance. Visit AlertLA.org for more information.
There is a brush fire in the area of Buckthorn Trail. The temporary evacuation point in the Golden Acorn Casino at 1800 Golden Acorn Way. More information is available at www.alertsd.org
